creator: eugen@freebsd.org
text:
This is known problem with bxe(4) driver that has broken incoming multicast processing. Closing this as duplicate of the PR 213606 that has more details.

Meantime, you may try to fix the driver yourself as driver author seems to be unresponsible or switch to another NIC.

*** This bug has been marked as a duplicate of bug 213606 ***
